full_script: V3.3: Select '5 Minute' to load optimized 5M scalping settings
Uses faster breakouts in trending markets
Toggle this OFF to trade longs only. 5M Profile: DISABLED
V3.2: BB width multiplier for exhaustion
V3.2: RSI above this = overbought exhaustion
V3.2: RSI below this = oversold exhaustion
Position must be up this % before adding
How far price must move before next add
Only add if ADX still strong. 5M Profile: DISABLED
V3.2: Each pyramid doubles in size
V3.2: Multiplier for each add (2.0 = double)
V3.2: Only pyramid when MACD accelerating
V3.2: Adjust spacing based on volatility
V3.2: Spacing multiplier in high volatility
Don't trade if ADX below this. 5M Profile: 18
indicator_declaration:
, 
         overlay=true, 
         initial_capital=10000,
         default_qty_type=strategy.percent_of_equity, 
         default_qty_value=10,
         commission_type=strategy.commission.percent,
         commission_value=0,
         pyramiding=6,
         process_orders_on_close=true,
         max_bars_back=500)
variable_declarations: trend_up = diplus > diminus and adx > trend_adx
trend_down = diminus > diplus and adx > trend_adx
squeeze = use_jetstream and bb_upper < kelt_upper and bb_lower > kelt_lower
expansion = use_jetstream and bb_upper > kelt_upper and bb_lower < kelt_lower
extreme_condition = (close > bb_basis and rsi_value > exhaustion_rsi_high) or (close < bb_basis and rsi_value < exhaustion_rsi_low)
exhausted = use_jetstream and band_stretched and extreme_condition
macd_bullish = use_momentum and macd_line > signal_line and histogram > histogram[1]
macd_bearish = use_momentum and macd_line < signal_line and histogram < histogram[1]
bull_divergence = use_divergence and low == lowest_price and macd_line > lowest_macd
bear_divergence = use_divergence and high == highest_price and macd_line < highest_macd
near_resistance = use_levels and not na(major_resistance) and close >= major_resistance * 0.98
near_support = use_levels and not na(major_support) and close <= major_support * 1.02
at_minor_resistance = use_levels and not na(minor_resistance) and close >= minor_resistance * 0.99
at_minor_support = use_levels and not na(minor_support) and close <= minor_support * 1.01
adx_ok = not use_regime or adx > var_min_adx_for_entry
valid_long = long_score >= min_score and adx_ok and not squeeze
valid_short = short_score >= min_score and adx_ok and not squeeze and var_enable_shorts
turtle_exit_long = use_turtle_exit and in_long and close < lowest_fast[1]
turtle_exit_short = use_turtle_exit and in_short and close > highest_fast[1]
divergence_exit_long = use_divergence_exit and in_long and bear_divergence
divergence_exit_short = use_divergence_exit and in_short and bull_divergence

functions_and_loops: if long_score >= max_score or short_score >= max_score
else if long_score >= full_score or short_score >= full_score
else if long_score >= min_score or short_score >= min_score
if valid_long and not in_long and not in_short
if valid_short and not in_short and not in_long
if is_profitable and price_moved_enough and trend_still_strong and not_exhausted and momentum_strong
